title: Rice Vinegared Filipino Boudin-Blanc Sinigang
description: Fresh, silky, hangover-cure Filipino dish featuring boudin-blanc, mushimono-steam, vegetarian-friendly, form=sinigang, vessel=wok.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large wok over medium heat.
Add the bok choy and shiitake mushrooms to the wok and cook until the bok choy is wilted, about 4 minutes.
Add the sinigang mix, shredded daikon, and green tomatoes to the wok and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of vegetable broth to the wok and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 8 minutes.
